intentSynonyms: show me my files in gdrive
see all my files in gdrive
list files and folders in a drive folder in gdrive
description: List files and folders in Google Drive. By default lists items in the root "My Drive" folder. Use parent_id to list children of a specific folder. Supports ordering by name, modifiedTime, or createdTime. Trashed files are excluded by default.

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID to list contents of. Defaults to "root" (My Drive)

page_size.description: Maximum number of files to return (default 50, max 1000)

page_token.description: Page token from a previous response for pagination

order_by.description: Sort order. Examples: "name", "modifiedTime desc", "createdTime desc". Default: "modifiedTime desc"

include_trashed.description: Include trashed files in results (default false)
